name: codex-excalidraw
description: A local Excalidraw canvas for Codex, modeled after Cowart's local canvas plus MCP design.

interface.shortDescription: Use a project-local Excalidraw canvas from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Excalidraw runs a local Excalidraw web canvas for the active project and exposes MCP tools for Codex to read selected elements, insert assets, and generate images or videos into the scene.
defaultPrompt: Open the Excalidraw canvas for this project.
Generate a new image into the selected Excalidraw AI holder.
Generate a Grok Imagine video next to the selected Excalidraw element.
